name: OpenCTI
description: Integrate with OpenCTI (Open Cyber Threat Intelligence) platform to query indicators, threat actors, malware, and intelligence reports via the GraphQL API

auth_config.note: Bearer token using UUID v4 API key from user profile. Header format: Authorization: Bearer {api_key}

actions.name: Search Indicators
actions.description: Search OpenCTI for STIX indicators by pattern value, type, or label using GraphQL query

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to find indicators (IP, domain, hash, URL)

parameters.name: indicator_types
parameters.description: Filter by indicator type (e.g. IPv4-Addr, Domain-Name, StixFile, Url)

actions.name: Search Observables
actions.description: Search OpenCTI STIX Cyber Observables (SCOs) for technical indicators like IPs, domains, and hashes

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Observable type filter (IPv4-Addr, Domain-Name, StixFile, Url, Email-Addr)

actions.name: Search Threat Actors
actions.description: Search OpenCTI intrusion sets and threat actor records

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Threat actor or intrusion set name to search

actions.name: Search Malware
actions.description: Search OpenCTI malware records including families, tools, and associated indicators

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Malware name or keyword to search

actions.name: Search Reports
actions.description: Search OpenCTI intelligence reports from connected feeds and manual submissions

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Report title or keyword to search

actions.name: Search Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Search OpenCTI vulnerability records by CVE ID or description

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: CVE ID or vulnerability description to search

actions.name: Create Indicator
actions.description: Create a new STIX indicator in OpenCTI via GraphQL mutation

parameters.name: pattern_type
parameters.description: Pattern type: stix, yara, sigma, pcre, snort
